recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Shatters His Best Streaming Week Total After Biopic Release, as Catalog Floods Charts - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Shatters His Best Streaming Week Total After Biopic Release, as Catalog Floods Charts. The late icon more than doubles his previous best total, as *Thriller* and "Billie Jean" lead his albums and songs' returns. Confirming projections reported in late April, Michael Jackson obliterates his personal-best domestic streaming week following the release of the *Michael* biopic. The King of Pop’s solo song catalog registered a collective 137.5 million official on-demand streams for the week of April 24-30 in the United States, according to Luminate, up 146% and more than doubling his previous career high. ### Michael Jackson’s Top 50 Hit Songs on the Billboard Hot 100. Before his nine-digit streaming haul, Jackson’s solo catalog achieved a new personal benchmark last week at 55.9 million song clicks. *Thriller* classic “Billie Jean” leads the song recap, as it repeats its usual standing as the catalog’s most streamed song (9.4 million) and returns to the Billboard Hot 100 at No. 38.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於麥可傑克森因傳記電影上映而創下串流新高，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.snippet: The late icon more than doubles his previous best total, as *Thriller* and "Billie Jean" lead his albums and songs' returns. Confirming projections reported in late April, Michael Jackson obliterates his personal-best domestic streaming week following the release of the *Michael* biopic. The King of Pop’s solo song catalogue registered a collective 137.5 million official on-demand streams for the week of April 24-30 in the United States, according to Luminate, up 146% and more than doubling his previous career high. Prior to the *Michael* era, the late icon, who died in 2009, recorded a high of 53.7 million for the week of Oct. 25-31, 2019, spurred by the now-annual Halloween resurgence for “Thriller.”. *Michael* covers Jackson’s life from 1966 to 1988, including time with both The Jackson 5 and The Jacksons groups with his brothers. *Thriller* classic “Billie Jean” leads the song recap, as it repeats its usual standing as the catalogue’s most streamed song (9.4 million) and returns to the Billboard Hot 100 at No. 38.

recentArticles.snippet: We are, right now, the largest independent music company I think in the world in terms of legacy artists. Most importantly, we’re in the legacy protection business and we think it’s a win-win for artists and our company and fans, by the way, to the extent that we’re successful in protecting that legacy by growing new revenue streams for the band, you know? We want to make sure that we’re working with pop culture artists like Kendrick, like Bruno, that like the idea of sampling, and using some of our legacy music. They’re thinking, ‘Oh my God, my life’s gonna go on forever’, and then 20 years later, when the same artists are in their 80s, maybe it’s time to estate plan, right? Maybe it’s time to bring on a partner, to think about legacy protection… it’s a great market right now for that.

recentArticles.title: Beyoncé stuns wearing skeletal gown at Met Gala with Jay-Z, Blue Ivy - usatoday.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Beyoncé stuns wearing skeletal gown at Met Gala with Jay-Z, Blue Ivy. Updated May 4, 2026, 10:53 p.m. ET. Beyoncé has arrived at the 2026 Met Gala, making a grand entrance with husband Jay-Z and daughter Blue Ivy Carter. The Grammy-winning singer graced the red carpet with her family at the Metropolitan Museum of Art's 2026 spring exhibition on May 4, where the theme was "Costume Art" and the dress code was "Fashion Is Art.". Jay-Z opted for a classic black tuxedo with a vest. This year marks Beyoncé's first Met Gala appearance in a decade. She last appeared in 2016 for the "Manus x Machina" gala, donning a nude-colored Givenchy Haute Couture dress. This is the first time Beyoncé's daughter has appeared at the Met Gala. ## Beyoncé and Jay-Z last appeared at the Met Gala together in 2015. Jay-Z last appeared at the Met Gala in 2015 alongside Beyoncé for the "China: Through the Looking Glass" Costume Institute Benefit Gala.

recentArticles.title: Louis C.K. Gets Standing Ovation at Raunchy Comeback Show During Netflix Comedy Festival - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: After slowly rebuilding his career following 2017's sexual misconduct allegations, the comedian headlined the Hollywood Bowl as part of Netflix is a Joke fest. Cut to 2026, and he headlined a show at the Hollywood Bowl as part of the Netflix is a Joke comedy festival. C.K. took the stage in L.A. on Tuesday night, the show serving as the final stop of the worldwide “Ridiculous” tour he’s been on for the last year. It’s not his only gig with Netflix either, as in addition to the comedy festival, the streamer will premiere C.K.’s upcoming comedy special, *Ridiculous*, on the platform this summer. In an email to his newsletter subscribers when the Netflix is a Joke appearance was first announced, C.K. called the Hollywood Bowl set “the very last show of this tour which has taken me around the world and will likely be my last full-scale comedy headline type show for a looong time.” He added, “I hope you can make it.”.

recentArticles.title: How Much Did Michael Jackson’s Streams Increase Following the Release of ‘Michael’ Biopic? - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: This week: Michael Jackson’s catalog sees massive gains in the wake of the successful first weekend for the* Michael *biopic, Prince and Beyoncé *fans commemorate two very different kinds of 10th anniversaries*, Death Cab for Cutie still packs a TV-synching punch and more.*. Jackson’s song streams have soared in the wake of his biopic *Michael*, more than doubling in the immediate days after the film’s wide release on April 24. Preliminary reports have The Jackson 5’s catalog at 3.4 million streams from April 24-26, up 89% from the corresponding days in the prior week. Based on those three days of activity, the first post-*Michael* week is well positioned to give Jackson his biggest U.S. streaming week ever, in terms of official on-demand streams for his solo work. As anticipation for *Michael* swelled in recent weeks, Jackson’s catalog set new personal bests in streaming for the last two weeks – with 50.6 million clicks in the April 10-16 period and 55.3 million April 17-23.

recentArticles.title: 8 Celebrities Who Love Motorcycles With A Passion - Jalopnik
recentArticles.snippet: It's an escape, and in some cases, a way of life. We're not here to say who has the largest or priciest two-wheeled fleet, but to talk about celebrities with an itch only a motorcycle can scratch. It should come as no surprise that the man with one of the most enviable garages in the world loves motorcycles. That man is Jay Leno, a TV host-turned-collector with an exquisite 180-plus car collection featuring some of the most expensive cars in the world, complemented by a fleet of over 160 motorbikes. So it's odd to hear that some of Reeves' early film contracts banned him from riding, but it's not too shocking given the risks of a motorcycle crash to such a valuable star. In fact, he once told Esquire that riding is "the best feeling in the world." It's a passion rooted so deeply that it drove the Scottish actor — and his friend, Charley Boorman — to ride from London to New York in April 2004 for the TV series "Long Way Round." The duo did so astride a 1,130cc flat-twin BMW R1150GS, covering 22,345 miles across Europe, Asia, and North America.

recentArticles.title: Passage cuts 75% of workforce after FDA trial design request - BioSpace
recentArticles.snippet: # Passage cuts 75% of workforce after FDA trial design request. ## Passage Bio, which has been working toward a registrational trial for a drug candidate whose indications include frontotemporal dementia, is exploring strategic alternatives in addition to cutting staff. Shortly after announcing that the FDA will require a specific registrational trial design for its lead drug candidate in one target indication, Passage Bio has disclosed it will cut about 75% of its workforce to reduce operating expenses. On April 20, Passage announced the outcome of a recent Type C meeting with the FDA regarding design of a future registrational trial for PBFT02 for the treatment of frontotemporal dementia with granulin mutations (FTD-GRN). Will Chou, the company’s president and CEO, said the agency did not support a single-arm trial design and instead will require a randomized controlled trial. The company noted that to maximize shareholder value, it is exploring strategic alternatives that could include a merger or acquisition, a sale of assets and licensing opportunities.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於生物科技公司Passage Bio因FDA要求調整藥物試驗設計而裁員75%，其執行長名為Will Chou，但內容與華語歌手周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Marihiko Hara on His Artistic Vision & Its Culmination in 'KOKUHO’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Billboard Japan spoke with composer Marihiko Hara, the composer of the score for the film *KOKUHO*, for its MONTHLY FEATURE series spotlighting artists and works currently worthy of note. At the 49th Japan Academy Film Prize held in March 2026, it swept 10 awards including Picture of the Year, with Hara himself taking home prizes in the Outstanding Achievement in Music and Theme Song categories. You won in the Outstanding Achievement in Music and Theme Song categories at the Japan Academy Film Prize — how are you feeling now?**. Yes. The music I’d listened to over the years, like Toru Takemitsu and Ryuichi Sakamoto, naturally included instruments from outside the Western tradition, so my ear was already attuned to them. Director Lee heard it and said, “This is really good, but it’s not possible to sustain three hours on just this, so we’ll need melody that works as film music, too.” I understood that, of course, but needed to present what I felt was the essential core of the sound first.

AMC, the world’s largest exhibitor, and new live entertainment company Arena One have set a June launch for a live concert venture that will beam events in real time to more than 300 AMC locations nationwide. Arena One At AMC will debut with performances from Bebe Rexha (June 17), Paris Hilton (June 18) and Maren Morris (June 20). The format expands access for fans while giving artists a way to reach audiences without the limitations of traditional touring, the partners said. recentArticles.title: 5 Reasons Why Michael Ruled The Box Office - SlashFilm
recentArticles.snippet: Lionsgate, director Antoine Fuqua, and Michael Jackson's estate have successfully weathered a lot of turmoil to deliver one of the biggest hits of the year so far. "Michael," a biopic covering the King of Pop's rise to superstardom, defied expectations at the box office, posting a massive global opening. We're going to look at the biggest reasons why "Michael" ruled the box office on its opening weekend. This was a movie geared towards adults, particularly those who grew up loving Michael Jackson's music. ## Few people have ever been more famous than Michael Jackson. It may seem simple, but the not-so-secret sauce when it comes to the success of "Michael" is the fact that Michael Jackson is one of the most famous people to ever walk on planet Earth. This film, in some ways, is the closest a lot of people will get to a prime Michael Jackson concert, with a side of "Behind the Music" to go with it.

recentArticles.title: Jaafar Jackson’s Used His 2026 Met Gala Look to “Push the Narrative Forward” - Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: Met Gala 2026 Red Carpet Arrivals. # Jaafar Jackson’s Used His 2026 Met Gala Look to “Push the Narrative Forward”. After coming off a whirlwind press tour for the hit biopic *Michael,* Jaafar Jackson—the singer and actor who portrays his moonwalking, single-gloved uncle in the film—is heading from one media frenzy straight into another: the 2026 Met Gala. “It was a bit last-minute for me, given everything going on with *Michael,* so I wasn’t able to start from scratch,” the 29-year-old said. “But I wanted to approach it in a way that felt true to me, of course, not just visually striking, but intentional. It didn’t feel like I was wearing a costume, it felt like an extension of me, just elevated for the moment.”. And while he wanted to make sure and honor the night’s dress code—“Fashion Is Art”—his Ralph Lauren look is, in part, a way to make him feel grounded during a chaotic moment. * See Every Look from the Met Gala 2026 Red Carpet.

recentArticles.title: NCT’s Taeyong To Release First Full-Length Album, ‘WYLD,’ On May 18 - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # NCT’s Taeyong To Release First Full-Length Album, ‘WYLD,’ On May 18. NCT’s Taeyong is set to release his first full-length album, *WYLD*, on May 18, a defining moment in his solo career. With NCT’s 10th anniversary this year, Taeyong is defining his solo artist identity with *WYLD*, evolving and growing since his 2016 debut (he debuted as a solo artist in 2023). Best known as the leader of global K-pop supergroup NCT and its popular sub-unit NCT 127 (Also NCT U and SuperM), Taeyong is known for his distinct style and versatile performances. In 2024, he performed two back-to-back sold-out solo concerts, 2024  TAEYONG CONCERT, at Seoul’s Olympic Hall. NCT-127 is headlining Day 1, Friday’s MC Countdown concert, and Taeyong will perform as “Taeyong of NCT” on Saturday, Day 2, of the KCON concert at the Crypto.com Arena, alongside ZEROBASEONE, ILLIT, and P1Harmony. Fans, known as NCTzen or Czennie, can expect him to play his new album during his solo performance.

recentArticles.title: Vic Mensa Signs With ColorCreative (EXCLUSIVE) - Deadline
recentArticles.snippet: ## site categories. ### AEG Presents Sets Strategic Partnership With Comedy Promoter Outback Presents. # Vic Mensa Signs With ColorCreative. **EXCLUSIVE:** ColorCreative has signed musician, actor, and filmmaker Vic Mensa for management. ### Boris Kodjoe Signs With ColorCreative](https://deadline.com/2026/02/boris-kodjoe-signs-colorcreative-1236715231/). In music, Mensa rose to prominence with early projects like *Innanetape* and his 2017 debut album *The Autobiography*, which he followed up with *Victor* (2023) and the independent EP *sundiata* (2025). He has collaborated with artists including Kanye West, Jay-Z, Pharrell Williams, and Pusha T, earning nominations from the Grammys, NAACP Image Awards, and mtvU Woodie Awards. Alongside his music career, Mensa has built an acting resume with roles on Showtime’s *The Chi*, HBO’s *South Side*, and Peacock’s *Bel-Air*. Mensa will continue to be represented by Buchwald. ## Must Read Stories. * ### ‘Prada 2’ Steps Out With $233M+ WW Bow; ‘Michael’ At $424M. * ### Fiennes, Farrell & Moura Set For Fernando Meirelles Comedy ‘Art’. ## Read More About:. ## Site.

recentArticles.title: On the hunt for spring ephemerals in northern Illinois - Northern Public Radio
recentArticles.snippet: # On the hunt for spring ephemerals in northern Illinois. Northern Public Radio | By Jay Weichun. Spring ephemerals are woodland plants found throughout the Upper Midwest. Since 2022, the Forest Preserve District of Kane County has used the iNaturalist app to help educate the public on the various ephemeral species that can be found in our region. Users can upload photos to the app and help create a record of when and where the plants bloom. Gingrich says plant signage and the iNaturalist app help participants identify plants and learn about plant habitat and characteristics. "The community of users also helps with identifying plants and can suggest identifications when the original poster may have gotten it wrong.”. Users are invited to submit photos of the Kane County spring 2026 ephemerals through the app until May 31, 2026. Jay Weichun is a correspondent with WNIJ's Community Corps. See stories by Jay Weichun.

recentArticles.title: Parliament-Funkadelic, Jimmie Vaughan, Chaparelle, and Other Reviews From Austin Blues Festival - The Austin Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: I’m so glad that they’re so open-minded to bring this music as part of Austin Blues Festival music,” he then added sincerely. ### Jimmie Vaughan and Special Guests Craft Love Letter to Blues, Soul, and Austin Music. Guest Soul Man Sam jokingly pointed out that he just turned 78 with no such recognition, then locked in the audience with Gospel-like preaching and a raucous “Let the Good Times Roll.” Tomar Williams followed, showing off on powerful renditions of the Vaughan Brothers’ “Tick Tock” and Eddie Floyd’s “Knock on Wood.” After much anticipation, Gary Clark Jr. joined the band, singing on “Oh, Pretty Woman (Can’t Make You Love Me)” and trading solos with Vaughan on “I Like It Like That” and “Wine, Wine, Wine.” The collaborative marathon set couldn’t have captured the ethos of the Austin Blues Festival any better.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Unveils Her Most Personal Work Yet with New Self-Titled Album - When In Manila
recentArticles.snippet: 2x GRAMMY® Award-winning R&B powerhouse Kehlani released her highly anticipated self-titled fifth studio album, *KEHLANI*, on her birthday, April 24, 2026. The project captures her at her most honest, blending soul-baring storytelling with the lush, genre-bending sound that has made her one of modern R&B’s most influential voices. The album was anchored by a trio of defining singles, beginning with “Folded,” a breakout anthem that has become one of the defining R&B records of the decade. “Folded” delivered major award recognition, including 2x GRAMMY® wins for Best R&B Song and Best R&B Performance, an iHeartRadio Music Award for R&B Song of the Year (where she made her debut award show performance), NAACP Image Awards nominations, and three American Music Award nominations, including Song of the Year. Kehlani will also be honored with the Impact Award at the upcoming Billboard Women in Music, where she will deliver a special performance in celebration of her influence on music and culture.
